title: Support  - Poly Product Support screen color in light mode
scenario: Verify that the top box color on the Poly Product Support screen matches the main body color in light mode.
steps: Start the app in light mode.
Go to Poly Lens Menu > Support.
Check top box of the screen (most upper row).
expected: User is redirected to Poly support page. Color of the top box should match the color of the main body of the screen.
